cm.name: Conrad Kongkal Sangma
portfolios: and all portfolios not otherwise allocated

ministers.name: Conrad Kongkal Sangma
portfolios: and all portfolios not otherwise allocated

channels.label: CM Connect - Chief Minister's citizen grievance helpline
channels.source_name: Meghalaya Government Portal (official state portal homepage)
channels.note: State portal homepage carries the banner 'DIAL 1971 for CM CONNECT'. This is Meghalaya's CM helpline for grievances, scheme information and escalation. Corroborated independently on the NeGD (MeitY) India Stack Local directory listing for Meghalaya.

channels.label: CM Connect - alternate toll-free number
channels.source_name: National e-Governance Division (NeGD), MeitY - India Stack Local directory, Meghalaya CM Connect entry
channels.note: Listed alongside 1971 as a designated toll-free helpline for CM Connect. Sourced from the NeGD/MeitY official catalogue entry; not currently repeated on meghalaya.gov.in itself.

channels.label: CM Connect - WhatsApp chatbot
channels.source_name: National e-Governance Division (NeGD), MeitY - India Stack Local directory, Meghalaya CM Connect entry
channels.note: WhatsApp chatbot channel for raising CM Connect grievances. Sourced from the NeGD/MeitY official catalogue entry.

channels.label: Meghalaya One - citizen grievance redressal and services portal
channels.source_name: Meghalaya One - Government of Meghalaya
channels.note: Live (HTTP 200, valid TLS). The site's own meta description reads: 'Meghalaya One - One digital Gateway for Citizen Grievance Redressal, Service Delivery and Engagement'. NOTE: the older MegPGRAMS portal (megpgrams.gov.in), still linked from meghalaya.gov.in/services/content/19327, no longer resolves (DNS ENOTFOUND) and was deliberately excluded.

channels.label: Meghalaya Police - Citizen Portal (e-FIR, complaints, verifications)
channels.source_name: Meghalaya Police Citizen Portal (CCTNS), Government of Meghalaya
channels.note: Official CCTNS citizen portal. Offers e-FIR/complaint filing, character and tenant/employee verification, FIR search, missing/wanted person lookup and feedback.

channels.label: Meghalaya Police - official website
channels.source_name: Meghalaya Police, Government of Meghalaya - Citizen Services page
channels.note: Official state police website; Citizen Services page indexes the citizen portal, FIR services, daily crime reports and legal services information.

channels.label: Meghalaya Police Headquarters / DGP office exchange, Shillong
channels.source_name: Meghalaya Police - Telephone Directory
channels.note: Published as 'Office of the Director General of Police :: Meghalaya : Shillong : (Police Exchange Nos. 2222001/ 2222033/2222043)' under 'Civil (STD-0364)'. This is the DGP office exchange, NOT a 24x7 police control room. Alternates: 03642222033, 03642222043. Meghalaya Police does not publicly publish a state control-room number - its 'Control Rooms' and 'Other Important Telephone Numbers' pages both return 'You are not authorized to access this page'.

channels.label: Meghalaya Government Portal - official state portal
channels.source_name: Meghalaya Government Portal (Government of Meghalaya, hosted by NIC)
channels.note: Official state portal. Footer shows the site was last updated 14 July 2026, confirming it is currently maintained.

channels.label: Meghalaya districts directory - links to each district website
channels.source_name: Meghalaya Government Portal - Districts
channels.note: Official district directory listing all districts with headquarters, area and population, each linking to its own district site: eastgarohills.gov.in, northgarohills.gov.in, southgarohills.gov.in, westgarohills.gov.in, southwestgarohills.gov.in, eastkhasihills.gov.in, westkhasihills.gov.in, southwestkhasihills.gov.in, westjaintiahills.gov.in, eastjaintiahills.gov.in, ribhoi.gov.in.

channels.label: Meghalaya official helpline numbers directory
channels.source_name: Meghalaya Government Portal - Helpline Numbers
channels.note: State's own consolidated helpline table (table itself last updated 30 Jan 2024). Lists Police 100, Fire 101, Medical 108, Disaster 112, Women 1091/181, Child 1098, Electricity 1912, PDS/NFSA 1967 and 1800-345-3670. Note: the women/child numbers it lists are the national helplines, not Meghalaya-specific, so they are not returned separately here.

channels.label: Electricity complaint (MePDCL/MeECL) - toll-free
channels.source_name: Meghalaya Government Portal - Helpline Numbers
channels.note: Published centrally by the state as 'Electricity Complaint - 1912'. Meghalaya's distribution utility is MePDCL, under Meghalaya Energy Corporation Ltd (MeECL).

channels.label: MeECL / MePDCL customer care, Shillong
channels.source_name: Meghalaya Energy Corporation Ltd (MeECL) - Customer Care Centre
channels.note: Published as 'Customer Care: (0364) 2591932 | 2591088 | 2591335 | 2590656'. Alternates: 03642591088, 03642591335, 03642590656. Customer care email: customercare.mepdcl@meghalaya.gov.in.

channels.label: MeECL / MePDCL Customer Care Centre
channels.source_name: Meghalaya Energy Corporation Ltd (MeECL) - Customer Care Centre
channels.note: Official DISCOM customer care page; also links the consumer portal, online bill payment and service-centre jurisdiction lists in English, Khasi and Garo.

channels.label: PDS / NFSA (ration) helpline - Meghalaya toll-free
channels.source_name: Meghalaya Government Portal - Helpline Numbers
channels.note: Published as 'PDS/NFSA - 1967 / 1800-345-3670'. The 1800-345-xxxx series is Meghalaya's state-specific toll-free range; 1967 is the national NFSA short code.

channels.label: National Emergency Number (ERSS) - Police, Fire & Rescue, Health
channels.source_name: Ministry of Home Affairs, Government of India
channels.note: MHA's single pan-India emergency number: 'ONE INDIA ONE EMERGENCY NUMBER 112', a nationwide unified emergency response system. Works in every State/UT. Corroborated by india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 112 as the Integrated Helpline (ERSS) covering Police, Fire & Rescue and Health services.

channels.label: Fire Helpline
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed under 'Emergency Numbers' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: National Ambulance Service (NAS)
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed as 'National Ambulance Service (NAS)' under Emergency Numbers on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: Women Helpline (national, toll-free)
channels.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Women Helpline Toll free No. - 181' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed on india.gov.in as both 'Women Helpline Number' and 'Domestic Violence Helpline'.

channels.label: National Commission for Women (NCW) 24x7 Helpline
channels.source_name: National Commission for Women (NCW)
channels.note: NCW's own site states: 'Call the 24x7 NCW helpline at 14490 for immediate assistance and support', and lists 'NCW Women Helpline (14490)' under its Complaint Redressal cells. IMPORTANT: the india.gov.in helpline directory still lists 7827170170 as the 'National Commission for Women Helpline' - that number appears nowhere on ncw.gov.in (not even in raw HTML), so it appears stale and was deliberately omitted in favour of the department's own current number.

channels.label: Child Helpline (national, toll-free)
channels.source_name: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Child Helpline Toll free No. - 1098' directly by the owning ministry (WCD) as a tel: link on its homepage. Also listed as 'Child Help Line' on india.gov.in.

channels.label: Elderline - National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)
channels.source_name: Department of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of India
channels.note: Published as 'Elder Helpline: 14567' on the Department of Social Justice & Empowerment's own Elderline site, which the ministry homepage links to as the 'National Helpline for Senior Citizens (NHSC)'. india.gov.in additionally lists a landline 011-20893999 alongside 14567 for the Senior Citizens Helpline.

channels.label: National Consumer Helpline (NCH)
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed as 'National Consumer Helpline (NCH)' on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026). Note: the NCH portal consumerhelpline.gov.in could not be reached at time of research (DNS resolves to an NIC address but the host refused connections / returned 504), so only the number is cited here - not the NCH portal URL.

channels.label: Cyber Crime Helpline (online financial fraud reporting)
channels.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
channels.note: Confirmed on the National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal homepage banner (MHA / Indian Cyber Crime Coordination Centre - I4C), which reads: 'To report online financial fraud, call 1930' and 'register your complaint at cybercrime.gov.in'. Independently corroborated by the india.gov.in helpline directory, which lists 1930 as the Cyber Crime Helpline.

channels.label: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal (file a cybercrime complaint)
channels.source_name: National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal, MHA / I4C
channels.note: Verified live. Ministry of Home Affairs portal for reporting cybercrime; supports anonymous reporting, women/children-related crime, financial fraud and other cybercrime, plus complaint tracking. Nationwide.

channels.label: CPGRAMS - Centralised Public Grievance Redress and Monitoring System
channels.source_name: Ministry of Personnel, Public Grievances & Pensions, Government of India
channels.note: Verified live; this is the citizen-facing portal. The site states CPGRAMS is 'an online platform available to the citizens 24x7 to lodge their grievances to the public authorities on any subject related to service delivery... a single portal connected to all the Ministries/Departments of Government of India and States.' Supports tracking by registration ID and an appeal facility. Note: it does not cover RTI matters, subjudice/court matters, or religious matters.

channels.label: Central Vigilance Commission - lodge a corruption complaint
channels.source_name: Central Vigilance Commission (CVC), Government of India
channels.note: Verified live. CVC's Complaint Management System with a 'Citizen Login', complaint status tracking and a published complaint handling policy. Linked from cvc.gov.in as 'Lodge a complaint'. Covers corruption complaints against central government organisations.

channels.label: Relief Commissioner for Natural Calamities
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).

channels.label: Road Accident Helpline
channels.source_name: National Portal of India (india.gov.in), NIC / MeitY
channels.note: Listed on the National Portal of India helpline directory (page last reviewed/updated 14 July 2026).
